# PERF-036 negative: the loop variable is shadowed per iteration
lang: go
file: PERF-036-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"sync"
)

func FanOut(items []int) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, v := range items {
		v := v
		wg.Add(1)
		go func() {
			fmt.Println(v)
			wg.Done()
		}()
	}
	wg.Wait()
}
